added.title: Temporal evidence labels stay reusable
added.summary: Frame labels and zone references stay generic enough for repeat comparison coverage.
added.recommendation: Keep public-safe labels stable across fixture updates.

before.title: Automated action readiness is unsupported
before.summary: The packet implies automated household action without a caller-owned gate.
before.recommendation: Keep household action outside the shared fixture.

after.title: Automated action readiness is unsupported
after.summary: The packet now says any household action remains caller-owned and unsupported in the shared fixture.

before.title: Occupancy inference exceeds temporal evidence
before.summary: The packet treats one synthetic shape change as proof that a person entered the space.
before.recommendation: Reduce the claim to a generic temporal anomaly until caller-owned evidence says more.

after.title: Occupancy inference exceeds temporal evidence
after.summary: The packet now limits the claim to a generic temporal anomaly, but one sentence still hints at occupancy without support.
after.recommendation: Keep the finding framed as anomaly follow-up only.
